CVE-2019-17545.title: GDAL through 3.0.1 has a poolDestroy double free in OGRExpatReall ...
CVE-2019-17545.summary: GDAL through 3.0.1 has a poolDestroy double free in OGRExpatRealloc in ogr/ogr_expat.cpp when the 10MB threshold is exceeded.

CVE-2021-45943.title: GDAL 3.3.0 through 3.4.0 has a heap-based buffer overflow in PCID ...
CVE-2021-45943.summary: GDAL 3.3.0 through 3.4.0 has a heap-based buffer overflow in PCIDSK::CPCIDSKFile::ReadFromFile (called from PCIDSK::CPCIDSKSegment::ReadFromFile and PCIDSK::CPCIDSKBinarySegment::CPCIDSKBinarySegment).

CVE-2025-29480.title: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in gdal 3.10.2 allows a local attac ...
CVE-2025-29480.summary: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in gdal 3.10.2 allows a local attacker to cause a denial of service via the OGRSpatialReference::Release function. NOTE: the Supplier indicates that the report is invalid and could not be reproduced.
